tagline: The World's Most Sustainable Vodka Company
description: Misadventure & Co. is a craft vodka distillery and tasting room that produces the world's first carbon-negative vodka made from surplus baked goods. They operate a cocktail bar in Vista, CA featuring live music, food, and craft cocktails made exclusively with their award-winning Misadventure Vodka. The brand combines sustainability with memorable experiences and fun.
location: 2420 Grand Ave. Suite C, Vista, CA 92081
social_proof: 18 awards won; World's first carbon negative consumer good; First and only spirit made from excess baked goods
key_cta: ORDER ONLINE or VISIT OUR TASTING ROOM
missing: No business hours listed, no email contact provided, no customer testimonials or reviews displayed, no Instagram/social media links visible, no online reservation system for tasting room, no newsletter signup confirmation, limited product photography
brand_vibe: Fun, retro, sustainable, adventurous, approachable craft spirit
pain_point: No clear business hours or reservation system makes it difficult for potential visitors to plan a tasting room visit.
chat_persona: A friendly, enthusiastic brand ambassador who celebrates sustainability and fun adventures while helping customers learn about the vodka, book tasting room visits, and navigate event reservations.
cta_angle: Visit the tasting room for a craft cocktail experience or reserve a private event
